set -e

cd /home/user/repo

# Save original commit SHAs for log
ORIGINAL_ROOT="37362327a66f8cb9bcbd1034d04f83c4a5009847"

ORIGINAL_HUMAN3="d8ae9b40f87a1716c33296937a0c09161bd2cb53"

# Bot commits
BOT1="c48cb254c476c3db2f2cb5c691a67759bea937e9"
BOT2="1e775ed7be5da7a83894a126cb5ec4f3c73c9892"
BOT3="f307015ed894df1030d54ecc22c0030ce3a9e90b"
BOT4="133e651ff24bf1bdee9e3cd5f8156bc595030118"
BOT5="76996e3bf33d3c82550e06225e8f12a4e20b076a"
BOT6="074f92927f11d9f03f41dbd023a26e4dc3a16834"
BOT7="59262c1aaf405d21ba9c41a817911979a792f75e"
BOT8="c961c7b5bb2a88420b00a96067db4ffbeae0e469"

# Create new orphan branch starting from root - delete old one first
git checkout main
git branch -D rewritten 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout --orphan rewritten $ORIGINAL_ROOT

# Need to truly be on a fresh orphan branch
git rm -rf . 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout $ORIGINAL_ROOT -- .
# Initial commit (no amend since we're orphan)
git commit -m "feat: initial data setup"

NEW_ROOT=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "New root: $NEW_ROOT"

# Cluster 1: 3 bot commits - squash into one
# The tree at f307015 (end of bot cluster 1) is what we need
git checkout --detach $NEW_ROOT
rm -rf * .[!.]* 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout $BOT3 -- .
git add .
git commit -m "chore: [bot] squashed 3 automated commits"
SQUASH1=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "After squash 1: $SQUASH1"

# Add human1 - tree should be same as ORIGINAL_HUMAN1
git checkout --detach $SQUASH1
rm -rf * .[!.]* 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout $ORIGINAL_HUMAN1 -- .
git add .
git commit -m "feat: add main module"
HUMAN1_NEW=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "After human 1: $HUMAN1_NEW"

# Cluster 2: 2 bot commits (BOT4, BOT5) - ends at BOT5
git checkout --detach $HUMAN1_NEW
rm -rf * .[!.]* 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout $BOT5 -- .
git add .
git commit -m "chore: [bot] squashed 2 automated commits"
SQUASH2=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "After squash 2: $SQUASH2"

# Add human2
git checkout --detach $SQUASH2
rm -rf * .[!.]* 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout $ORIGINAL_HUMAN2 -- .
git add .
git commit -m "feat: add process function"
HUMAN2_NEW=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "After human 2: $HUMAN2_NEW"

# Cluster 3: 3 bot commits (BOT6, BOT7, BOT8) - ends at BOT8
git checkout --detach $HUMAN2_NEW
rm -rf * .[!.]* 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout $BOT8 -- .
git add .
git commit -m "chore: [bot] squashed 3 automated commits"
SQUASH3=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "After squash 3: $SQUASH3"

# Add human3
git checkout --detach $SQUASH3
rm -rf * .[!.]* 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout $ORIGINAL_HUMAN3 -- .
git add .
git commit -m "feat: add cleanup function"
HUMAN3_NEW=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
echo "After human 3: $HUMAN3_NEW"

# Update main
git checkout main
git reset --hard $HUMAN3_NEW

echo "SUCCESS! New HEAD: $(git rev-parse HEAD)"
ENDSCRIPT
